title: Scheduling Framework — PreEnqueue
text:
These plugins are called prior to adding Pods to the internal active queue, where Pods are marked as
ready for scheduling.
Only when all PreEnqueue plugins return
Success
, the Pod is allowed to enter the active queue.
Otherwise, it's placed in the internal unschedulable Pods list, and doesn't get an
Unschedulable
condition.
For more details about how internal scheduler queues work, read
Scheduling queue in kube-scheduler
.
